title: Air-con noise keeps residents awake
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Eben Strydom, a long-time...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Eben Strydom, a long-time resident living directly opposite the Knysna Magistrate’s Court, says he and his family have endured years of relentless noise from industrial air-conditioning units, with little more than silence in response from the authorities.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Eben Strydom, a long-time resident living directly opposite the Knysna Magistrate’s Court, says he and his family have endured years of relentless noise from industrial air-conditioning units, with little more than silence in response from the authorities."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Strydom has been leading the call for action since 2021, submitting extensive evidence including emails, video footage, noise recordings, and even a memory stick handed to the municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Our sleep is robbed from us every single night,” he said. “It’s like having multiple trucks idling outside our home from midnight to sunrise.”","html":"“Our sleep is robbed from us every single night,” he said. “It’s like having multiple trucks idling outside our home from midnight to sunrise.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite written notices and inspections promised by the Department of Public Works (DPW), the issue remains unresolved. A contractor reportedly visited in June 2023 but left without addressing the problem due to load shedding. Promises of Occupational Health and Safety visits have followed, yet the noise persists.","html":"Despite written notices and inspections promised by the Department of Public Works (DPW), the issue remains unresolved. A contractor reportedly visited in June 2023 but left without addressing the problem due to load shedding. Promises of Occupational Health and Safety visits have followed, yet the noise persists."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Strydom reported that on 21 August, all six air-conditioning units were running by 07:00 after being switched on in the early hours, a pattern he says is repeated almost nightly. “We got maybe two hours of sleep,” he added. “The intermittent motor cycling is unbearable, not a steady hum, but a constant disturbance.”","html":"Strydom reported that on 21 August, all six air-conditioning units were running by 07:00 after being switched on in the early hours, a pattern he says is repeated almost nightly. “We got maybe two hours of sleep,” he added. “The intermittent motor cycling is unbearable, not a steady hum, but a constant disturbance.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The homes in Spring Street are just across the street from the air-conditioning units at the back of the Knysna Magistrate's Court. Photos: Rozano Alie","html":"The homes in Spring Street are just across the street from the air-conditioning units at the back of the Knysna Magistrate's Court. Photos: Rozano Alie"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Nwabisa Pondoyi, municipal communications officer, confirmed that the matter is being dealt with under the Western Cape Noise Control Regulations, PN 200 of 2013."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She explained that while written notices have been issued and an investigation is ongoing, a final notice and any legal action can only proceed once formal testing is conducted by a registered acoustic engineer.","html":"She explained that while written notices have been issued and an investigation is ongoing, a final notice and any legal action can only proceed once formal testing is conducted by a registered acoustic engineer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After years of complaints and no resolution, Strydom says residents are considering taking the matter to the media or legal channels: “If the government won’t enforce its own laws, what choice do we have?”","html":"After years of complaints and no resolution, Strydom says residents are considering taking the matter to the media or legal channels: “If the government won’t enforce its own laws, what choice do we have?”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
